description: just a wrapper of web/agent customized commands

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n nextjs,python -c auto "pnpm run dev:web" "pnpm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:agent: cd agent && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000
scripts.sync: pnpm run sync:web && pnpm run sync:agent
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:web && pnpm run typecheck:agent
scripts.test: pnpm run test:web && pnpm run test:agent
